notes: Authored from Browserless v2 REST API docs. The adaptor exposes createPDF (POST /pdf) plus a generic request(). Covered /pdf, /screenshot, /content and /scrape. The real /pdf and /screenshot endpoints return binary (application/pdf, image/png); to satisfy the JSON-response seed requirement they are modelled here as {base64,type} wrappers matching the base64 value the adaptor stores on state.data. Base URL production-sfo.browserless.io is the hosted region default; self-hosted deployments use their own host.
